title: Carmen C81117 Illuminated Cosmetic Vanity Mirror with Touch Sensor, 360° Adjustability, Dimmer Function, Chrome
features: FULLY ILLUMINATED 360° LIGHTING: With a 360° degree LED lighting all around the mirror that provides a powerful illumination, its easy to achieve your flawless look
DOUBLE SIDED MIRROR: You can use the standard mirror side for your everyday make-up application, while the 5x magnification side is perfect for close-up grooming, shaving or plucking eyebrows
SMART TOUCH SCREEN TECHNOLOGY: You can easily turn the mirror on/off at the touch of a button, without the hassle of any cords
360° ADJUSTABILITY: Find the perfect angle using 360° rotating mirror, perfect for focusing on one particular area of your face by spinning it around
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Professional Carmen quality with a standard 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2-year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Specifications 5x magnified side Dimmer function with 4 levels 360° degree swivel motion Cordless: Battery operated requiring 4 x AAA batteries (not included) Anti-slip material on the base Round mirror with pedestal stand Illuminate your look at the touch of a button, giving a bright and even light for optimal make-up application You can easily turn the mirror on/off and adjust the brightness via the modern smart touch screen technology and functions cordlessly, meaning you don’t have the hassle of cords. With 1x normal side and 5x magnification side provides easy visibility, perfect for facial care, shaving and plucking Includes modern smart touch screen technology for instant illumination Dimmer function with 4 levels for your perfect lighting Find the ideal position during your skincare or make-up routine using the 360° swivel motion Battery operated and cordless, allowing you to move and position the mirror anywhere in the house. The battery compartment is located inside the mirror Its wide base and anti-slip material ensures the mirror remains secure on your chosen surface Due to the integrated stand, you can use the mirror immediately without the need to drill or glue SMART TOUCH SCREEN TECHNOLOGY You can easily turn the mirror on/off at the touch of a button, without the hassle of any cords FULLY ILLUMINATED 360° LIGHTING With a 360° degree LED lighting all around the mirror that provides a powerful illumination, its easy to achieve your flawless look DOUBLE SIDED MIRROR You can use the standard mirror side for your everyday make-up application, while the 5x magnification side is perfect for close-up grooming, shaving or plucking eyebrows
